Lesson 8 Summary Guide
 Important formula to remember:
o T.T. + I.B. = F.H.L.
o Targeted Traffic + Irresistible Bribe = Freakin’ Huge List!
 While a big list is good, it’s much more critical to have a
RESPONSIVE list
 Primary focus of your online business should be “list building”
 Set up processes that drive traffic and “squeeze” that traffic to
join your list
 Squeeze pages are at the heart of list building – squeeze them
into a decision to join your list
 Squeeze pages might include a:
o Headline
o Video and/or persuasive copy
o Opt-in box
 Typical opt-in rates can range from 5% to as high as 50%
 Important to split test squeeze pages to determine your best
converting offer, layout, etc.
o Example: Test two pages with different headlines or
different videos or different page layouts.

-- 1 of 2 --

2
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
 Ideas for driving traffic to your squeeze page quickly:
o Pay-Per-Click (Google Adwords)
o Articles (EzineArticles)
 Include link to squeeze page in “Author’s Bio”
o Targeted Forums
 Include squeeze page URL in signature
o Social Media (Facebook, Twitter, Google+)
o Blog
 Keyword targeted posts that include links to
squeeze page
o YouTube
 Put up a few videos that include the link to the
squeeze page in the description area
 Consider using multiple squeeze pages for the different traffic
sources you are tapping into
 Consider using Google Website Optimizer to split test your
pages
 A Bribe is offered on all squeeze pages
o Create your bribe with your prospect in mind (dreams,
aspirations, frustrations)
 Types of Bribes:
o PDF report
o Video
o Teleseminar / Webinar
o Personal consultation
o Survey
o Software
